nameMeanings.name: Warde
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Irish Cormac, Donal.

variants.name: Ward
meanings: English: occupational name for a watchman or guard, from Middle English ward ‘watchman, guard’ (Old English weard, used as both an agent noun and an abstract noun).
English: occupational name from Middle English warde ‘armed guard’ (Old English weard ‘watching, guarding’), with the same meaning as 1 above.

Irish: shortened form of McWard, an Anglicized form of Gaelic Mac an Bhaird ‘son of the poet’. The surname occurs throughout Ireland, where three different branches of the family are known as professional poets.

nameMeanings.name: Richard
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: One of the most enduringly successful of the Old French personal names introduced into Britain by the Normans. It is of Germanic (Frankish) origin, derived from rīc ‘power’ + hard ‘strong, hardy’. It has enjoyed continuous popularity in England from the Conquest to the present day, influenced by the fact that it was borne by three kings of England, in particular Richard I ( 1157–99 ). He was king for only ten years ( 1189–99 ), most of which he spent in warfare abroad, taking part in the Third Crusade and costing the people of England considerable sums in taxes. Nevertheless, he achieved the status of a folk hero, and was never in England long enough to disappoint popular faith in his goodness and justice. He was also Duke of Aquitaine and Normandy and Count of Anjou, fiefs which he held at a time of maximum English expansion in France. His exploits as a leader of the Third Crusade earned him the nickname ‘Coeur de Lion’ or ‘Lionheart’ and a permanent place in popular imagination, in which he was even more firmly enshrined by Sir Walter Scott's novel Ivanhoe ( 1820 ).

historicEvents.title: Book of Common Prayer
historicEvents.description: Book of Common Prayer, a product of the English Reformation, was published in 1549 for assistance in the administration of the sacraments and other rites and ceremonies of the church according to the use of the Church of England. The book outlined morning, evening, and communion prayers and orders for baptism and marriage, thus making England a truly Protestant state.

en.lifeSummary: Richard ( Richerd) Warde was born in 1520, in Horsham, Sussex, England, United Kingdom. He married Agnes in 1542, in Horsham, Sussex, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 2 daughters. He was buried in Horsham, Sussex, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Richard ( Richerd) Warde est né en 1520, à Horsham, Sussex, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Il a épousé Agnes en 1542, à Horsham, Sussex, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 2 filles. Ilenterré à Horsham, Sussex, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Richard ( Richerd) Warde wurde 1520 in Horsham, Sussex, England, United Kingdom geboren. Er hat 1542 in Horsham, Sussex, England, United Kingdom Agnes geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 2 Töchter. Er wurde in Horsham, Sussex, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Richard ( Richerd) Warde è nato il nel 1520 nel Horsham, Sussex, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Lui sposato Agnes nel 1542, nel Horsham, Sussex, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 2 figlie. Fu sepolto a Horsham, Sussex, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Richard ( Richerd) Wardeは1520年にイギリスイギリススセックスホールシャムで生まれた。1542年にイギリスイギリススセックスホールシャムでAgnesと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼はイギリススセックスホールシャムにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Richard ( Richerd) Warde(은)는 1520년 영국 잉글랜드 수세스 호르샤에서 태어났다. 그는 1542년 영국 잉글랜드 수세스 호르샤에서 Agnes(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 영국 수세스 호르샤에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Richard ( Richerd) Warde nasceu em 1520, em Horsham, Sussex, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Ele casou-se com Agnes em 1542, em Horsham, Sussex, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 2 filhas. Ele foi sepultado em Horsham, Sussex, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Richard ( Richerd) Warde родился в 1520 г. в местности хауршам, суссекс, Англия, Великобритания. Он женился на женщине по имени Agnes в 1542 г. в местности хауршам, суссекс, Англия, Великобритания. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 2 дочери. Он был похоронен в местности хауршам, суссекс, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Richard ( Richerd) Warde nació en 1520, en Horsham, Sussex, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Se casó con Agnes en 1542, en Horsham, Sussex, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 2 hijas. Fue sepultado en Horsham, Sussex, Inglaterra.
